index.title: BrainCheck - AI-Powered Language Learning App | Flashcard English Study
index.description: BrainCheck is an app for efficient English learning with AI-powered flashcards. Features ML recommendations, speech recognition evaluation, and high-quality TTS for natural pronunciation learning. Supports iOS, Android, Windows, macOS.
index.keywords: English learning, flashcard, AI English, English app, TOEIC, English conversation, language learning, BrainCheck
index.hero_below_title:
The Essence of Language Learning
Handled with Precision
index.hero_description: BrainCheck is a language learning community platform that uses flashcards as its core abstraction to precisely address the essence of language learning.
index.hero_description_ko:
원하는 것을 적으세요.
뇌체크가 더 쉽고 오래 기억하도록 도와줍니다.
index.hero_description_en:
Write down what matters to you.
BrainCheck helps you remember more easily and for longer.

what_we_do.heading: What We Do
what_we_do.intro: Language learning may seem complex, but it can essentially be summarized into two processes.
items: Listening is the process of recognizing sounds and determining correct answers
Speaking is the process of converting thoughts into language and verifying their accuracy
what_we_do.abstraction: BrainCheck abstracts all these processes into a simple flashcard interface.
what_we_do.tracking: Behind the scenes, it continuously tracks the learner's comprehension, retention rate, and forgetting speed.
what_we_do.goal: It adjusts the learning flow so that learners always remain in the 'optimal memory state'.

features.heading: Technology & Experience
features.intro: BrainCheck is built around these core technologies to simultaneously elevate both learning efficiency and experience.

cards.title: ML-Based Recommendation System
cards.desc: Analyzes learner comprehension and forgetting patterns to select the next study material at the optimal timing

cards.title: High-Quality Text-to-Speech (TTS)
cards.desc: Delivers an immersive listening experience with natural speech that closely resembles real conversation

cards.title: Speech Recognition (STT) & Pronunciation Evaluation
cards.desc: Recognizes user speech and provides instant feedback on pronunciation, accuracy, and sentence completion

cards.title: AI-Powered Auto Content Generation
cards.desc: Input books or audio and they're automatically converted into flashcard-format study materials

cards.title: Full Multi-Platform Support
cards.desc: Provides the same learning flow and experience across iOS, Android, macOS, and Windows

content_creation.heading: Content Creation & Sharing
content_creation.intro: On BrainCheck, users are more than just learners.
items: Anyone can create their own language learning books (decks)
And share or sell them to other users
Provide text or audio and AI automatically generates learning content — users can review and publish immediately
content_creation.goal: A language learning user community of learners and creators

mission.heading: Our Belief
mission.text:
We help people learn what they want in the minimum amount of time.
Learning is not about investing more time — it's about

eliminating unnecessary time.

items.title: 1. Perfection comes from removal
items.quote: "Perfection is achieved not when there is nothing more to add, but when there is nothing left to take away." — Antoine de Saint-Exupéry
items.text: BrainCheck keeps removing to focus on the essence rather than piling on features.

items.title: 2. Learning is a process of 'arrival'
items.quote: Learning is not accumulating information, but reaching a state where you can arrive at the truth of a subject on your own.
items.text: We design so that users reach understanding through intuition and deduction.

items.title: 3. Easy explanations are short and show the whole picture
items.intro: An easy explanation is not a detailed one. It's one that makes the other person feel they "understand" in a short time.
items.quote: This comes not from individual pieces of information, but from showing the structure and perspective of the entire situation.
items.text: Every learning experience in BrainCheck is designed based on this principle.

items.a: Yes, basic features are available for free.

items.q: What devices can I use it on?
items.a: It supports iOS, Android, macOS, and Windows.
Yes, all devices are automatically synced when you log in.

app.name: BrainCheck
app.description: AI-powered flashcard language learning app. Uses the FSRS machine learning algorithm to analyze learner forgetting patterns and suggest optimal review timing, with high-quality TTS and speech recognition (STT) pronunciation evaluation for listening and speaking practice.
features: ML-based FSRS spaced repetition recommendation system
iOS, Android, macOS, Windows multi-platform support

faqs.question: What kind of learning app is BrainCheck?
faqs.answer: BrainCheck is an AI-powered flashcard language learning app. Machine learning analyzes learner forgetting patterns to suggest reviews at optimal timing, with speech recognition (STT) and high-quality TTS for listening and speaking practice.

faqs.question: Is BrainCheck free?
faqs.answer: Yes, basic features are available for free. Some premium features are available through subscription.

faqs.question: Is it available on both iOS and Android?
faqs.answer: Yes, it is. You can use it on iOS, Android, macOS, and Windows, with the same learning experience across all platforms.

faqs.question: Is my learning data synced across devices?
faqs.answer: Yes, it is. When you log in to your account, your learning progress and records are automatically synced across all devices.

faqs.question: Can I study offline?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can. If you download learning content in advance, you can study without an internet connection.

faqs.question: How is my personal information handled?
faqs.answer: BrainCheck complies with the Personal Information Protection Act. Learning data is encrypted and securely stored. For details, please refer to our Privacy Policy.

faqs.question: How do I cancel my subscription or get a refund?
faqs.answer: Subscription cancellation and refunds are processed according to each app store's (App Store, Google Play) policies. You can manage your subscription in your app store settings or contact our support center.
